{"parts":[{"content":"Analyze candidate fit for this role and generate a BALANCED trade-off framework.

JOB: Backend Engineer
TECH: Not specified
SCORE: 75/100

STRONG: Architect and maintain solutions, Collaborate with ML engineers, Lead project initiatives, Define technical stack, Monitor System Performance
WEAK/GAP: Ensure Security Compliance, Python Programming, Technical Documentation, DynamoDB, OpenSearch / Elasticsearch

Generate 5-6 trade-offs. Be OBJECTIVE - include at least 2 that are NOT "Strong fit".
Use verdicts: "Strong fit", "Verify in meeting", "More signal needed", "Gap"

Respond with ONLY valid JSON:
[
  {"need": "requirement", "verdict": "Strong fit|Verify in meeting|More signal needed|Gap", "reason": "brief reason", "verdict_class": "strong|verify|gap"}
]","timestamp":"2026-02-08T01:03:06.137141Z","part_kind":"user-prompt"}],"timestamp":null,"instructions":"","kind":"request","run_id":null,"metadata":null}
